who: accountants at small firms processing 5–15 tax documents/month
offer: For accountants at small firms processing 5–15 tax documents/month, inefficient tracking causes missed deadlines. We provide issue flagging instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to efficiently track tax documentation and identify issues in a timely manner.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accountants seeking help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accountants with a demo video
Participate in community forums for accountants sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and issue flagging on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
